articles.title: Changpeng Zhao (CZ) Hints at Launching a Meme Coin
articles.description: In light of speculation surrounding a potential meme coin launch, the price of BNB has surged over 12% in the last 24 hours.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation to explore staking after allocating 45,000 ETH to DeFi
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation has hinted at exploring staking after depositing 45,000 ETH across multiple DeFi protocols.The foundation on Thursday distributed around $120 million worth of ETH across four major DeFi platforms, with Aave Core receiving the largest share at 20,800 ETH. The entity also sent 10,000 ETH to Spark and Aave Prime each, and 4,200 ETH to Compound.The EF expressed plans to explore staking optionsThe EF's engagement with DeFi follows intense pushback from the crypto community ...

articles.title: Coinbase Adds POPCAT and PENGU on Solana
articles.description: Trading for these Solana-based tokens is set to begin on or after 9 AMPT on February 13, 2025, provided liquidity conditions are met. These new additions continue Coinbase’s push to expand its offerings, especially within the growing Solana ecosystem. POPCAT and PENGU are SPL tokens, meaning they’re native to Solana, a blockchain known for its […] The post Coinbase Adds POPCAT and PENGU on Solana appeared first on Altcoin Buzz.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation Invests $120M Worth of ETH Into DeFi
articles.description: Ethereum Foundation invests 45,000 ETH into DeFi lending protocols, responding to community demands to generate yield without liquidating assets.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation deploys $120M to DeFi apps; community celebrates
articles.description: Community members celebrated as the Ethereum Foundation deployed 45,000 ETH to decentralized finance protocols Aave, Spark and Compound.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation Moves 49,200 ETH Into DeFi
articles.description: The post Ethereum Foundation Moves 49,200 ETH Into DeFi appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News The Ethereum Foundation (EF) has made a major move by depositing a total of 49,200 ETH into various DeFi platforms. According to on-chain data, EF transferred 4,200 ETH to Compound, 10,000 ETH to Aave, and a massive 30,800 ETH to Spark. Another 4,200 ETH was later added to the Compound. This comes...

articles.title: Bitcoins moving from exchanges to non-custodial wallets: current and future reasons and potential impact
articles.description: After most significant failures of centralized platforms such as FTX, we could observe a large uptick in Bitcoin withdrawals from exchanges.

articles.title: Trump Swaps BTC-e Founder Vinnik for U.S. Teacher in Russia Deal
articles.description: President Trump traded BTC-e founder Alexander Vinnik for American teacher Marc Fogel in a prisoner swap, prioritizing Fogel’s release over aiding Vinnik.
